recommended_code_policy.do_not_match_by_prefix8_only: prefix8 only is useful for broad grouping but can merge different variants. Use generic_code exact when present, then yj_code[:9]+ZZZ, then exception table, then prefix8 as fallback.
recommended_code_policy.aggregate_exception_rule: generic_code suffix such as AZZZ/BZZZ/CZZZ may group multiple YJ variants; use ippan exception sheet if available.
recommended_code_policy.ocr_usage: Use alias_normalized for candidate search; use relation_edges confidence for auto-suggest strength, not for automatic final confirmation.
